case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS ASERCION, DOLLY (MOTHER) et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT ASERCION, DOLLY (MOTHER) ASERCION, MARYANN (DAUGHTER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ASERCION, DOLLY (MOTHER)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ASERCION, DOLLY (MOTHER) ASERCION, MARYANN (DAUGHTER) $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,025.50, DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARYANN ASERCION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
